title: Inside Iran's power struggle: Vahidi blocks Pezeshkian's intelligence minister pick
snippet: IRGC Commander-in-Chief Ahmad Vahidi reportedly blocked President Pezeshkian's choice for intelligence minister, demonstrating the military's growing control over civilian government. Major disagreements between the two persist.
tag_reason: Specific evidence of Vahidi's power: blocking cabinet appointment — new detail on IRGC-civilian government rift
